projectName: OptiAgent: Optimistic Verification Layer for ERC-8004 Trading Agents
hackathon: AI Trading Agents ERC-8004 | Lablab.ai | $55,000 SURGE token | deadline April 12 2026
description: OptiAgent builds upon the ERC-8004 standard but replaces the ZK-proof execution model (used in BondedTradeX/VeriFlow) with an Optimistic Verification Layer. Agents execute trades off-chain or on L2, posting a bond. A 24-hour 'Fraud Proof Window' allows any observer to challenge the trade if it deviates from the agent's stated intent or strategy. If challenged, the agent must submit a validity proof (simplified ZK or state root) or lose its bond. This enables high-frequency trading (HFT) capabili
angle: First application of Optimistic Verification (Fraud Proof Windows) to high-frequency agent trading, shifting from ZK-heavy verification to fast, low-cost execution with economic slashing for drift.
